betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Vacuum-Chamber High Power Laser Emitter§f is a 3×3×5 multiblock (TileVacuumLaser.java) used by the §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (10015) to write fine patterns onto §6Basic Circuit Plates§f. The structure is a sealed box of §6Structure Blocks§f with the lens column running through the middle and a §6Machine Structure§f at the controller face.

§6Production Path (libVulpes RecipesMachine + TileVacuumLaser)§f:
- Built via §6Crafting Table§f: 1x §6Lens Block§f (advancedrocketry:blocklens, quest 10013), 1x §6Aluminum Plate§f (libvulpes:productplate:9), 1x §6Red Crystal Block§f (advancedrocketry:crystal:3), 1x §6Machine Structure§f (libvulpes:structuremachine)
- Recipes added at runtime through `RecipesMachine.getInstance().addRecipe(...)`; the etcher category in JEI
- The emitter does not have a GUI of its own — it is wired to the Precision Laser Etcher via the multiblock detection system

The laser can etch circuit patterns at much higher resolution than the §6Vacuum Chamber§f predecessors, enabling §6Advanced Circuit Plates§f and §6Integrated Circuits§f that the §6Precision Laser Etcher§f consumes. Without this emitter the §6Chemical Reactor§f (10017), §6Electrolyser§f (10016), and §6Centrifuge§f (10018) quests cannot be unlocked.

§eTip§f: Build the §6Lens Block§f (10013) and at least one §6Red Crystal Block§f (from the §6Crystallizer§f at 10006) before attempting this quest; the recipe is comparatively cheap but the red crystal requires sapphire-oxide processing in the arc furnace.
